acceptanceReviewed.criterion: Done-node completion reports with empty commits[] are backfilled with their durable qd merge commit when one exists in roadmap/qd-export.json.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: The diff backfills 58 done-node reports from recorded qd merge summaries in roadmap/qd-export.json, using commits that resolve as git commits and are reachable from HEAD. No done nodes with empty commits[] remain.

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: scripts/qd-reports-check.sh rejects empty commits[] for completion reports whose node is done in roadmap/qd-export.json.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: validate_completion_done_node_commits checks roadmap status for the containing report directory node id and reports an error when a done-node completion report has an empty commits array.

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: In-flight/non-done completion reports may keep empty commits[].
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: The rule is conditional on roadmap status == done; this claimed node keeps commits[] empty and passes the checker.

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: Existing qd reports pass the stricter check after backfill.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: evidence/m4-qd-report-done-commits-contract/commands.log records nix develop -c just qd-reports-check passing.

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: Linux validation evidence records just qd-reports-check, just check, and a temporary-copy negative smoke test for a done-node report with empty commits[].
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: evidence/m4-qd-report-done-commits-contract/commands.log records the requested Linux validation commands and negative smoke test.

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: No macOS-specific validation is claimed or required.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: realWorldValidation.required is false and status is not_required for this repository-only validation change.

realWorldValidation.evidence: Repository qd report metadata validation only; Linux validation passed and macOS validation is not required.
